REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE A VIABLE CAUSE OF ACTION. SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE IS A REMEDY, NOT A STANDALONE CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE ITS RIGHT TO DEMUR. PLAINTIFF'S CITED AUTHORITY HAS NO CLEAR INDICATION THAT THE COMPLAINTS IN THOSE CASES NAMED SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE AS A CAUSE OF ACTION. AND THE FACT THAT THIS COURT HAS APPOINTED A RECEIVER AS A STIPULATED, PROVISIONAL REMEDY DOES NOT CONSTITUTE A HOLDING THAT SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE IS A VIABLE, STANDALONE CAUSE OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; REPORTED: RAQUEL SHARP; CSR# 10619; RAQUEL@TRANSCRIPTLEGAL.COM; 925-384-0003 (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Continued To Aug-20-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jennifer Recine; 212-556-2100; King & Spalding LLP, counsel for plaintiff appearing via Zoom.
Heath Rosenblat; 212-735-8600; Morrison Cohen LLP; counsel for defendant appearing via Zoom.
Reporter: Raquel Sharp; CSR# 10619; raquel@transcriptlegal.com; 925-384-0003

Ms Recine requests clarification regarding the courts tentative ruling. Discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROSENFELD, PINE & POWELL PARTNERS, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege a viable cause of action. Specific performance is a remedy, not a standalone cause of action. Defendant did not waive its right to demur. Plaintiff's cited authority has no clear indication that the Complaints in those cases named specific performance as a cause of action. And the fact that this Court has appointed a receiver as a stipulated, provisional remedy does not constitute a holding that specific performance is a viable, standalone cause of action.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Reported: Raquel Sharp; CSR# 10619; raquel@transcriptlegal.com; 925-384-0003 (D501)
